column1: Ecospace Model – Environmental Preferences  |  Northern Gulf of Mexico Panhandle

Optimum = preferred value; Min/Max = tolerance limits. Surface env (SST, SSS) applied to pelagic groups only; Bottom env (BBT, BBS) applied to demersal/benthic groups only. NA = not applicable. Depth in metres; Temp in °C; Salinity in PSU.
